# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- Use EmployeeTypeModel for EmployeeModel.EmployeeType and resolve persisted/default employee type values from the EmployeeType enum.
- Document every feature update and code change in AI CV Parsing.md to ensure work can be resumed in a new chat/session. Preserve initial findings in AI CV Parsing.md and append all actions/updates/insights/current state without deleting original findings.

## AI Parsing Features
- The 'Parse with AI' action must run pre-processing first and then AI summarization in one user-triggered flow.
- Users decide whether to save the AI summary output afterward.
- Present AI summary output in RichText/Word-style formatting with headings and subheadings.
